questionHtml:
Radioactive nuclide X decays into a stable nuclide Y. The decay constant of X is λ. The variation with time t of number of nuclei of X and Y are shown on the same axes.

What is the expression for s?


A.  ln 2λ

B.  1λ

C.  λln 2

D.  ln 2
